name: appendToGoogleDoc
description: Appends text to the very end of a specific Google Document or tab.

documentId.description: The ID of the Google Document (from the URL).

textToAppend.description: The text to add to the end.

addNewlineIfNeeded.description: Automatically add a newline before the appended text if the doc doesn't end with one.

tabId.description: The ID of the specific tab to append to. If not specified, appends to the first tab (or legacy document.body for documents without tabs).
